emails.subject: FW: Currency Hedging
emails.body: FW: Currency Hedging By the way, I agree with Zufferli on this. To: Hickerson, Gary; Stuart III, William; Lavorato, John; Milnthorp, Rob

emails.subject: RE: Currency Hedging
emails.body: RE: Currency Hedging I don't have all the facts to agree or disagree. Until John Z has approval to trade currency, I wouldn't think you would want to go down this path. In addition, I'm sure you know hegding currency this big and late of Fridays is tough. To: Shankman, Jeffrey A.

emails.subject: RE: Currency Hedging
emails.body: they forced him to trade on Friday. I want my money back To: Lavorato, John

emails.subject: RE: Currency Hedging
emails.body: huh? Gary booked almost nothing on this from what i can see. who forced what? I asked hickerson and zufferili to get me details. To: Shankman, Jeffrey A.
